notes: v1.6.94 — KNOW-TAB CONTENT DE-BAKE (Category 2 of the multi-site finalization — the content half deferred from v1.6.93). Reworded SITE ATTRIBUTION ONLY in the KNOW-tab hardware reference; every technical fact preserved VERBATIM (part numbers, reach, dBm thresholds rxMin/rxMax/alarmLow, connectors, U-conventions all unchanged). 10 edits across 12 refs: (1) 'HPC / CoreWeave Stack' header → 'HPC / GPU Compute Stack'; (2) PDU 'At AUS-01 you'll see…' → 'Typically you'll see… — confirm your site's PDU spec' (C13/C14, C19/C20, H100/H200, 208V 3-phase kept); (3) '(415V at AUS-01)' → '(415V typical)'; (4) 'two specific platforms in the CoreWeave fleet' → 'two specific Supermicro HGX platforms' (SYS-821GE-TNHR / AS-8125GS-TNHR kept verbatim); (5) 'Rack Position — CoreWeave AUS-01 Standard' → 'Typical Site Convention' and 'At AUS-01, H100/H200 nodes are placed…' → 'Typical placement… — confirm your site's convention' (the U12/U26 position table is untouched); (6) 'Austin winters especially' → 'dry winter months especially'; (7-10) four optic-card AUS-01 attributions ('AUS-01 standard … optic', 'AUS-01 uses MMS4X00-NS') → 'Common … — verify your site standard' / 'Commonly MMS4X00-NS' — MMA4Z00-NS400, MMS4X00-NS, 100m / 50m / 500m–2km reach, and all rx thresholds preserved exactly. Where a claim was site-policy (not physics) the 'verify your site standard' hedge was added per the spec; no facts invented, none deleted. VERIFIED: node --check 2/2 inline scripts + sw.js; JSON valid; style block untouched (block-0 braces 2494 = HEAD); fact-preservation diff inspected line-by-line — only attribution words changed, ZERO spec/number/part-number deltas; grep AUS-01/Austin now 7 (the justified logic remainders carried over from v1.6.93 — gated AUS01_CANONICAL_PLATFORMS preset + migration comments + historical boot note; all 9 KNOW-content mentions de-baked). The standalone org 'CoreWeave' in the BOM/Master FORMAT parsers + customer default remains OUT of scope (org-neutrality is a separate concern, not site identity). Multi-site finalization (v1.6.93 logic + v1.6.94 content) is now COMPLETE. Built in Claude Code on 56f67f6 (v1.6.93); web-Claude does post-merge parity review (one-builder rule). Three stamps at v1.6.94.
